summary:
Claim: The principal fibers of the periodontal ligament (PDL) are collagenous.  
Evidence: - Type I collagen forms the primary structural component of PDL principal fibers (horizontal, oblique, vertical). - Histologically confirmed as the dominant element providing tensile strength and mechanical stability under functional loads.  
Answer: C: Collagenous

Answer: C: Collagenous. Answer choice: C
